title: Aurora, 13297, Mini Flopsie Horse, 8In, Soft Toy, Black
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Mini Flopsie Horse Beau the 8" Mini Flopsie Horse is lovingly crafted with a soft and cuddly black coat. With a bean filled floppy body, this Mini Flopsie is a great cuddle buddy and an even better friend. Top quality materials are used to ensure durability and softness. Suitable from birth
